meaning: n.赠品,礼物,现在,瞄准adj.现在的,出席的,当面的vt.介绍,引见,给,赠送,上演,提出,呈现vi.举枪瞄准
examples: Did you get your mother a present?
Her letters conflate past and present.
How do you read the present situation?
Tsutsumi is a living demonstration of how money and political power intersect in present day Japan.
The Nottingham-born forward was ever-present in Southampton's Championship campaign last season, scoring 12 goals.
